note: M = (1-kappa*dt)I + coupling*W is the exact linearization of the full-stress homogeneous propagation in model.py. rho(M)<1 => shocks decay (sub-critical); rho(M) close to 1 => slow decay (near-critical). The panic term pi*|d_origin| is forcing from the origin's own decaying deviation, not feedback through other nodes.
